meta.educational_goal: To explore and understand Big-Theta notation through interactive plotting and analysis.

events.description: Request to plot the functions f(n) and g(n)
evidence: document.getElementById('plot').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); drawPlot(); logAppend('Plot requested: f='+state.fexpr+' g='+state.gexpr); });

events.description: Request to show the value table
Select n log(n) template for f(n)
Select n log(n) template for g(n)

evidence: document.getElementById('checkTheta').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const c1 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c1').value); const c2 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c2').value); const n0 = parseInt(document.getElementById('n0').value,10); const result = checkInequality(c1,c2,n0); if (result.ok) { logAppend('Inequality holds for all sampled n >= '+n0+' with c1='+c1+', c2='+c2+'. Result: PASS.'); } else { logAppend('Inequality FAILED at n='+result.counterexample+' (value f='+result.fval+' g='+result.gval+' )'); } drawPlot(c1,c2,n0); });

events.description: Request to search for constants c1, c2, n0
Request to estimate limit of f/g
evidence: document.getElementById('autoFindLimit').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const r = estimateLimit(); logAppend('Estimated limit of f(n)/g(n) as n→∞ ≈ ' + r.summary + ' (numerical samples: ' + r.values.slice(0,6).join(', ') + (r.values.length>6?' ...':'') + ')'); });
document.getElementById('classify').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const cls = classifyGrowth(); logAppend('Classification: ' + cls); });

document.getElementById('genCounter').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const cnt = findCounterexample(); if (cnt) { logAppend('Counterexample found at n='+cnt.n+'; f='+cnt.f+' g='+cnt.g); } else logAppend('No counterexample found in sampled range.'); });

document.getElementById('simplify').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const simp = asymptoticSimplify(); logAppend('Asymptotic simplification guesses: f ~ '+simp.f +'; g ~ '+simp.g); });

events.description: Toggle between points and lines in the plot
evidence: document.getElementById('togglePoints').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.pointsMode = !state.pointsMode; drawPlot(); logAppend('Toggled points/lines. Points mode = '+state.pointsMode); });

events.description: Toggle showing bounds in the plot
evidence: document.getElementById('showBounds').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.showBounds = !state.showBounds; drawPlot(); logAppend('Toggled show bounds. showBounds = '+state.showBounds); });

events.description: Request to export data as CSV

evidence: document.getElementById('startProof').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); state.proofSteps = []; state.currentStep = -1; logAppend('Proof workflow reset. Press Stepwise Search to prepare steps.'); });

events.description: Request to go to the next proof step
evidence: document.getElementById('nextStep').addEventListener('click', function(){ if (!state.proofSteps || state.proofSteps.length===0) { logAppend('No proof steps prepared. Click Stepwise Search first.'); return; } state.currentStep = Math.min(state.currentStep+1, state.proofSteps.length-1); const step = state.proofSteps[state.currentStep]; step.tried = true; document.getElementById('c1').value = step.c1; document.getElementById('c2').value = step.c2; document.getElementById('n0').value = step.n0; const result = checkInequality(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); if (result.ok) { logAppend('Step '+(state.currentStep+1)+': Candidate PASSED c1='+step.c1+' c2='+step.c2+' n0='+step.n0); drawPlot(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); } else { logAppend('Step '+(state.currentStep+1)+': Candidate FAILED at n='+result.counterexample+' c1='+step.c1+' c2='+step.c2+' n0='+step.n0); drawPlot(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); } });

events.description: Request to go to the previous proof step
evidence: document.getElementById('prevStep').addEventListener('click', function(){ if (!state.proofSteps || state.proofSteps.length===0) return; state.currentStep = Math.max(0, state.currentStep-1); const step = state.proofSteps[state.currentStep]; document.getElementById('c1').value = step.c1; document.getElementById('c2').value = step.c2; document.getElementById('n0').value = step.n0; logAppend('Moved to previous step '+(state.currentStep+1)); drawPlot(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); });

document.getElementById('accept').addEventListener('click', function(){ const c1 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c1').value); const c2 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c2').value); const n0 = parseInt(document.getElementById('n0').value,10); logAppend('User accepted candidate c1='+c1+' c2='+c2+' n0='+n0+'. Marking proof complete.'); });
document.getElementById('reject').addEventListener('click', function(){ logAppend('User rejected current candidate. Continue searching.'); });
document.getElementById('modeTheta').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.mode='theta'; document.getElementById('modeLabel').innerText = 'Mode: Θ'; logAppend('Mode set to Θ'); });
document.getElementById('modeO').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.mode='o'; document.getElementById('modeLabel').innerText = 'Mode: O'; logAppend('Mode set to O'); });
document.getElementById('modeOmega').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.mode='omega'; document.getElementById('modeLabel').innerText = 'Mode: Ω'; logAppend('Mode set to Ω'); });

expected_observables: Plot of f(n) and g(n) is displayed
evidence: document.getElementById('plot').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); drawPlot(); logAppend('Plot requested: f='+state.fexpr+' g='+state.gexpr); });

expected_observables: f(n) is set to a random expression
g(n) is set to a random expression

evidence: document.getElementById('checkTheta').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const c1 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c1').value); const c2 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c2').value); const n0 = parseInt(document.getElementById('n0').value,10); const result = checkInequality(c1,c2,n0); if (result.ok) { logAppend('Inequality holds for all sampled n >= '+n0+' with c1='+c1+', c2='+c2+'. Result: PASS.'); } else { logAppend('Inequality FAILED at n='+result.counterexample+' (value f='+result.fval+' g='+result.gval+' )'); } drawPlot(c1,c2,n0); });

document.getElementById('autoFindLimit').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const r = estimateLimit(); logAppend('Estimated limit of f(n)/g(n) as n→∞ ≈ ' + r.summary + ' (numerical samples: ' + r.values.slice(0,6).join(', ') + (r.values.length>6?' ...':'') + ')'); });

document.getElementById('genCounter').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); const cnt = findCounterexample(); if (cnt) { logAppend('Counterexample found at n='+cnt.n+'; f='+cnt.f+' g='+cnt.g); } else logAppend('No counterexample found in sampled range.'); });

document.getElementById('togglePoints').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.pointsMode = !state.pointsMode; drawPlot(); logAppend('Toggled points/lines. Points mode = '+state.pointsMode); });
document.getElementById('showBounds').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.showBounds = !state.showBounds; drawPlot(); logAppend('Toggled show bounds. showBounds = '+state.showBounds); });

document.getElementById('startProof').addEventListener('click', function(){ updateStateFromInputs(); state.proofSteps = []; state.currentStep = -1; logAppend('Proof workflow reset. Press Stepwise Search to prepare steps.'); });

document.getElementById('nextStep').addEventListener('click', function(){ if (!state.proofSteps || state.proofSteps.length===0) { logAppend('No proof steps prepared. Click Stepwise Search first.'); return; } state.currentStep = Math.min(state.currentStep+1, state.proofSteps.length-1); const step = state.proofSteps[state.currentStep]; step.tried = true; document.getElementById('c1').value = step.c1; document.getElementById('c2').value = step.c2; document.getElementById('n0').value = step.n0; const result = checkInequality(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); if (result.ok) { logAppend('Step '+(state.currentStep+1)+': Candidate PASSED c1='+step.c1+' c2='+step.c2+' n0='+step.n0); drawPlot(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); } else { logAppend('Step '+(state.currentStep+1)+': Candidate FAILED at n='+result.counterexample+' c1='+step.c1+' c2='+step.c2+' n0='+step.n0); drawPlot(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); } });

document.getElementById('prevStep').addEventListener('click', function(){ if (!state.proofSteps || state.proofSteps.length===0) return; state.currentStep = Math.max(0, state.currentStep-1); const step = state.proofSteps[state.currentStep]; document.getElementById('c1').value = step.c1; document.getElementById('c2').value = step.c2; document.getElementById('n0').value = step.n0; logAppend('Moved to previous step '+(state.currentStep+1)); drawPlot(step.c1, step.c2, step.n0); });

document.getElementById('accept').addEventListener('click', function(){ const c1 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c1').value); const c2 = parseFloat(document.getElementById('c2').value); const n0 = parseInt(document.getElementById('n0').value,10); logAppend('User accepted candidate c1='+c1+' c2='+c2+' n0='+n0+'. Marking proof complete.'); });
document.getElementById('reject').addEventListener('click', function(){ logAppend('User rejected current candidate. Continue searching.'); });
document.getElementById('modeTheta').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.mode='theta'; document.getElementById('modeLabel').innerText = 'Mode: Θ'; logAppend('Mode set to Θ'); });
document.getElementById('modeO').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.mode='o'; document.getElementById('modeLabel').innerText = 'Mode: O'; logAppend('Mode set to O'); });
document.getElementById('modeOmega').addEventListener('click', function(){ state.mode='omega'; document.getElementById('modeLabel').innerText = 'Mode: Ω'; logAppend('Mode set to Ω'); });
